📄 Complete Details & Notification

The State Bank of India (SBI) has officially announced the Trade Finance Officer (MMGS-II) - Specialist Cadre Officer Recruitment 2026 with 100 openings. The detailed notification was published on 13 May 2026 at sbi.co.in. Candidates who meet the age criteria of 23 to 32 years (relaxations applicable as per category) and hold a Graduate degree in any discipline from a recognized University along with Certification in Forex Operations from IIBF can now submit their online applications from 13 May 2026 to 02 June 2026. Direct links to download the notification and apply online are shared below.

FOLLOW US

SBI Trade Finance Officer Recruitment 2026 Notification PDF

State Bank of India, Central Recruitment & Promotion Department, Corporate Centre, Mumbai has officially released Advertisement No. CRPD/SCO/2026-27/05 dated 13.05.2026 for recruitment to 100 posts of Trade Finance Officer (MMGS-II) on Regular Basis under Specialist Cadre Officers. The notification includes complete details on vacancies, eligibility, age limit, pay scale, job profile, selection process, application fee, and instructions to apply. The position shall remain in Specialist cadre and will have no provision for conversion into General cadre. Candidates are strongly advised to carefully read the full notification before applying online. The notification PDF is available on the Bank’s official career website.

  • Download SBI Trade Finance Officer SCO Recruitment 2026 Official Notification PDF

SBI Trade Finance Officer SCO Recruitment 2026 Overview

Organization Name State Bank of India (SBI), Central Recruitment & Promotion Department, Corporate Centre, Mumbai
Advertisement No. CRPD/SCO/2026-27/05 dated 13.05.2026
Post Name Trade Finance Officer (MMGS-II) – Specialist Cadre Officer, Regular Basis
Grade / Scale Middle Management Grade Scale – II (MMGS-II)
Total Vacancies 100 (Regular: 88 + Backlog: 12)
Pay Scale Rs. 64820-2340/1-67160-2680/10-93960
Suggested Place of Posting Hyderabad & Kolkata (indicative only; selected candidates may be posted anywhere in India)
Application Mode Online only (via https://sbi.co.in/web/careers/current-openings)
Selection Mode Shortlisting and Interview
Cut-off Date for Eligibility 30.04.2026
Official Website https://sbi.co.in

SBI Trade Finance Officer Recruitment 2026 Important Dates

Event Date
Date of Advertisement 13.05.2026
Opening of Online Registration & Payment of Fees 13-05-2026
Last Date for Online Registration & Payment of Fees 02-06-2026
Eligibility Cut-off Date (Age, Qualification, Experience) 30-04-2026
Interview Date To be notified on SBI website
Call Letter for Interview Sent by email / uploaded on Bank’s website only (No hard copy)

SBI Trade Finance Officer Recruitment 2026 - Vacancy Details

A total of 100 vacancies have been announced for the post of Trade Finance Officer (MMGS-II) on regular basis, comprising 88 regular vacancies and 12 backlog vacancies. The vacancies include horizontal reservations for PwBD candidates. EWS vacancies are tentative and subject to further directives of Government of India and outcome of any litigation. The position shall remain in Specialist cadre with no provision for conversion into General cadre.

Post Type Total
Trade Finance Officer (MMGS-II) Regular 88
Backlog 12
Total 100

SC: Scheduled Caste | ST: Scheduled Tribe | OBC: Other Backward Class | EWS: Economically Weaker Section | UR: Unreserved | VI: Visually Impaired | HI: Hearing Impaired | LD: Locomotive Disability | d&e: Specific Learning Disability, Mental Illness, Autism spectrum disorder, Multiple disabilities. PwBD reservation is horizontal and included in overall vacancy of respective parent category.

SBI Trade Finance Officer Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria

Candidates must fulfill all eligibility conditions as on the cut-off date 30.04.2026. Teaching and training experience will not be counted for eligibility. The relevant experience certificate from the employer must specifically confirm that the candidate had experience in the related field as required. In cases where the degree/diploma certificate does not specify the field of specialization, a certificate from the concerned university/college specifically mentioning the specialization must be produced.

Educational Qualification and Experience

Qualification / Experience Details
Mandatory Educational Qualification Graduate (any discipline) from Government recognized University or Institution AND Certification in Forex Operations from IIBF (Certificate should be dated on or before 30.04.2026)
Preferred Qualification Certificate for Documentary Credit Specialists (CDCS) / Certificate in Trade Finance / Certificate in International Banking (Certificate should be dated on or before 30.04.2026)
Mandatory Experience Minimum 2 years’ post-essential academic qualification experience in Trade Finance processing in Supervisory/Official role in any Scheduled Commercial Bank
Specific Skills Required Outstanding communication, presentation and processing skills

SBI Trade Finance Officer Recruitment 2026 - Age Limit

Age is calculated as on 30.04.2026. Cumulative age relaxation will not be available. Candidates seeking age relaxation are required to submit copies of necessary certificate(s) at the time of interview, if shortlisted. No change in category of any candidate is permitted after online registration; no correspondence/email/phone will be entertained in this regard.

Category Age Limit / Relaxation
Unreserved (UR) 23 to 32 years (as on 30.04.2026)
OBC (Non-Creamy Layer) 3 years relaxation
SC / ST 5 years relaxation
PwBD (UR / EWS) 10 years relaxation
PwBD (OBC) 13 years relaxation
PwBD (SC / ST) 15 years relaxation

SBI Trade Finance Officer Recruitment 2026 - Application Fee

Application fee and Intimation Charges are non-refundable and must be paid online through the payment gateway integrated with the application (Debit Card/Credit Card/Internet Banking). Transaction charges for online payment, if any, will be borne by the candidate. Application fee once paid will NOT be refunded on any account nor can it be adjusted for any other examination or selection in future. In case of multiple applications, fee paid for other registrations will stand forfeited.

Category Application Fee
General / EWS / OBC Rs. 750/- (Rupees Seven Hundred Fifty only)
SC / ST / PwBD Nil (No fee / intimation charges)

SBI Trade Finance Officer Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process

Selection will be on the basis of Shortlisting and Interview. Merely fulfilling the minimum qualification and experience will not vest any right to candidate for being called for interview. The shortlisting committee constituted by the Bank will decide the shortlisting parameters. The decision of the Bank to call the candidates for interview shall be final. Interview will carry 100 marks; qualifying marks will be decided by the Bank. Merit list for selection will be prepared in descending order on the basis of scores obtained in interview only. In case of tie, candidates will be ranked according to their age in descending order. Intimation/Call Letter for Interview will be sent by email or uploaded on Bank’s website only - no hard copy will be sent.

Stage Details
Stage 1 Shortlisting (based on qualification, suitability, and experience as decided by the Bank’s shortlisting committee)
Stage 2 Interview (100 marks; qualifying marks decided by the Bank)
Merit List Prepared in descending order of interview scores; tie-breaking by age in descending order
Probation Period 6 months (as per Bank’s extant recruitment policy)

Grade, Pay Scale & Perquisites

Grade Probation Period Pay Scale Perquisites
Middle Management Grade Scale – II (MMGS-II) 6 Months Rs. 64820-2340/1-67160-2680/10-93960 DA, HRA, CCA, Provident Fund, NPS (Contributory Pension Fund), Leave Fare Concession (LFC), Medical Facility, and other perquisites as per rules in force from time to time

SBI Trade Finance Officer Recruitment 2026 - Job Profile & Key Responsibility Areas

The Trade Finance Officer (MMGS-II) position is in the Specialist cadre with no provision for conversion into General cadre. Suggested place of posting is Hyderabad and Kolkata; however, selected candidates may be posted anywhere in India at the sole discretion of the Bank. Requests for transfer/allotment to any centre other than Kolkata/Hyderabad shall not be entertained.

Area Details
Job Profile Trade Finance Document Scrutiny (LC/Collections/Bank Guarantees) for compliance with Bank/RBI/ICC/FEDAI/regulatory guidelines; Processing of Trade Finance and Forex transactions at a centralized location; Reconciliation of Trade Finance and Forex related entries in Bank’s Trade Finance, Forex and CBS systems and IDPMS/EDPMS; Any other tasks related to Bank’s Trade Finance and International Business back-office operations.
Key Responsibility Areas Accurate and efficient processing of all allotted Trade Finance and/or Forex transactions within benchmarked TAT; Tracking and ensuring periodic activities including maturities, payments, prompt follow-up, customer reconciliation; Timely reconciliation of related accounts/systems; Work closely with all stakeholders to maintain agreed customer TAT; Ensure adherence to all regulatory/bank/ICC/FEDAI guidelines; Participation in RCSA, BCOR, process review and training activities; Timely submission/compliance of all Audit Reports; Any other activity as directed by Team Leaders and Department/Branch Heads.

How to Apply for SBI Trade Finance Officer Recruitment 2026

Applications must be submitted online only through the link available on SBI’s official website https://sbi.co.in/web/careers/current-openings. No other mode of application will be entertained. Hard copy of application and other documents need not be sent to this office. The process of registration is completed only when fee is deposited with the Bank through online mode on or before the last date. Candidates are advised to apply online well before the closing date and not to wait till the last date to avoid any technical issues.

Candidates must upload all required documents at the time of online application; failure to upload documents will result in candidature not being considered for shortlisting/interview. After expiry of the window for online application, no change/correction/modification will be allowed under any circumstances.

Documents to be Uploaded at the Time of Online Application:

  • Recent Photograph & Signature (JPEG)
  • Detailed Resume (PDF)
  • ID Proof (PDF)
  • Proof of Date of Birth (PDF)
  • Caste Certificate & PwBD Certificate (if applicable) (PDF)
  • Mandatory Educational Certificates: Degree Certificate (PDF)
  • Mandatory Certification in Forex Operations from IIBF (PDF)
  • Experience Certificates (mandatory) (PDF)
  • Preferred Certificate, if any (PDF)
  • Biodata Form (duly filled, signed & scanned - available on Bank’s career website under the advertisement) (PDF)
  • Form-16 / Offer Letter / Latest Salary Slip from current employer (PDF)
  • No Objection Certificate (NOC) from present employer (mandatory if working in Government Institute/Public Sector Unit/Public Sector Bank) (PDF)
  • Mandatory Undertaking (format available on Bank’s career page against Adv. No. CRPD/SCO/2026-27/05) (PDF)

Apply Online at: https://sbi.co.in/web/careers/current-openings

Important Instructions for SBI Trade Finance Officer Recruitment 2026 Candidates

  • Candidates must apply online only; hard copy of application and other documents need not be sent to SBI’s office.
  • The position of Trade Finance Officer (MMGS-II) shall remain in Specialist cadre and will have no provision for conversion into General cadre.
  • Teaching and training experience will not be counted for eligibility.
  • Candidates with any disciplinary proceedings pending or contemplated against them as on date will not be eligible to apply; an undertaking must be uploaded at the time of online application.
  • CIBIL: Candidates who have defaulted in repayment under any lending arrangement with Banks/NBFCs/Financial Institutions including credit card dues and have not regularized/repaid their outstanding till the date of issuance of offer of recruitment by the Bank shall not be eligible for appointment.
  • Candidates serving in Govt./Quasi Govt. offices/Public Sector undertakings/Nationalized Banks must submit NOC from their employer at the time of interview, failing which their candidature will not be considered.
  • In case of multiple applications for the same post, only the last valid (completed) application will be retained; fee paid for other registrations will stand forfeited.
  • OBC certificate containing the ‘non-creamy layer’ clause, issued during the period 01.04.2026 to the date of interview, must be submitted by OBC candidates if called for interview.
  • EWS candidates not in possession of “Income & Asset Certificate” for FY2025-26 on or before closure of online application date should apply under “UR Category” only.
  • Outstation candidates called for interview will be reimbursed airfare (economy class, shortest route, to-and-fro) up to a maximum of Rs. 10,000/- on submission of original flight tickets/invoice and boarding pass.
  • All changes/updates/revisions/corrigendum/results will be hosted on the Bank’s website only; no separate intimation will be issued.
  • Any legal proceedings arising out of this advertisement can be instituted only in Mumbai; Courts/Tribunals/Forums at Mumbai only shall have sole and exclusive jurisdiction.
  • Candidates are advised to keep their email ID/mobile number active till the declaration of result and issuance of call letters on final selection.
  • SBI does not endorse, authorize or associate with any external coaching platform, consultancy, individual or digital channel claiming to provide guaranteed selection or insider guidance. Candidates must rely solely on information available on SBI’s official career portal.

Sub-Total (OCS Quota) 17

Grand Total: 91 Posts (PACS: 74 + OCS: 17)

PH (Physically Handicapped / PwBD) Sub-Category Vacancy (Total 03 Posts - under PACS Quota only)

Sl. No. Sub-Category of PwBD Post No. of Posts
1 Blindness and Low Vision 01
2 Deaf and Hard of Hearing 01
3 Locomotor Disability including Cerebral Palsy, Leprosy Cured, Dwarfism, Acid Attack Victims and Muscular Dystrophy 01

HPSCB Junior Clerk Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria

Candidates must fulfill all eligibility conditions as on 01-01-2026. All reserved category candidates must be Bonafide Himachalis. Reservation benefits are applicable only to Bonafide Himachali candidates. OBC candidates must submit a valid Non-Creamy Layer certificate from competent authority. Candidates belonging to SC/ST/OBC/EWS/PwBDs/Ex-SM and other reserved categories of HP may apply against unreserved/general category posts but will not be eligible for age relaxation or fee concession in such cases. Candidates must also ensure they are not directly or indirectly a defaulter of their society.

Experience certificates must be issued by the concerned Inspector of Society and countersigned by the Assistant Registrar, Cooperative Societies of H.P. with authentic certification. Such certificate must be supported by: (i) Copy of resolution of the managing committee for initial appointment, and (ii) Copy of relevant pages of statutory audit report/note for prescribed years showing payment of wages/salary from the society account.

Educational Qualification

Post / Quota Essential Qualifications
Junior Clerk (PACS Quota - Trained Secretaries of PACS of HP) (i) Graduate in any discipline from a recognized University (Candidates must have passed Matriculation and 10+2 from a School/Institution within Himachal Pradesh - not applicable for Bonafide Himachalis); (ii) Minimum 3 years continuous service as Secretary as defined in Rule 2(vii) of H.P. Cooperative Societies Rules, 1971 of Primary Agriculture Credit Society; (iii) All employees of PACS covered under definition of "Trained Secretaries" are eligible; (iv) Candidate should not be a defaulter of his/her society
Junior Clerk (OCS Quota - Employees of Other Cooperative Societies and PACS employees not covered as Trained Secretaries) (i) Graduate in any discipline from a recognized University (Matriculation and 10+2 from HP school - not applicable for Bonafide Himachalis); (ii) Minimum 5 years continuous service in a cooperative society; (iii) All employees of other cooperative societies and PACS employees not covered under definition of "Trained Secretaries" are eligible; (iv) Candidate should not be a defaulter of his/her society

Types of PACS and OCS covered under this recruitment:

Quota Type Societies Covered
PACS (Primary Agricultural Credit Societies) Cooperative Multipurpose Societies Ltd.; Gram Service Cooperative Societies Ltd.
OCS (Other Cooperative Societies) Fruit Growers and Marketing Society Ltd.; Marketing and Consumer Cooperative Societies Ltd.; Cooperative Consumer Store; Thrift & Credit Society Ltd.; All other Cooperative Societies registered under HP Cooperative Societies Act, 1968

HPSCB Junior Clerk Recruitment 2026 - Age Limit

Candidates must be above 18 years and below 45 years of age as on 01-01-2026. Candidates born between 02-01-1981 and 01-01-2008 (both days inclusive) are eligible. Age relaxation is applicable only to Bonafide Himachali candidates of the respective reserved categories. Selected PwBD candidates will have to submit a Medical Certificate from a competent authority confirming physical fitness to perform duties.

Category Age Relaxation
General (UR) 18 to 45 years (as on 01-01-2026)
SC of HP 5 years relaxation (max 50 years)
ST of HP 5 years relaxation (max 50 years)
OBC of HP 5 years relaxation (max 50 years)
EWS of HP As per HP Govt. norms
Physically Handicapped (PwBD) 5 years relaxation (minimum 40% disability required)
Ward of Freedom Fighter (WFF) of HP 5 years relaxation
Ex-Servicemen (Reserved Vacancies) Age at time of joining military service should not exceed upper age limit; present age must be less than 58 years (Maximum relaxation: 12 years)
Ex-Servicemen (Unreserved Vacancies) Actual age minus approved military service must not exceed prescribed maximum age by more than 3 years (Maximum relaxation: 12 years)

HPSCB Junior Clerk Recruitment 2026 - Application Fee

Candidates applying for the post of Junior Clerk are required to pay a non-refundable application fee as specified below. The fee must be paid online through the HPSCB application portal. Fee once paid will not be refunded under any circumstances. Bank transaction charges for online payment will have to be borne by the candidate.

Category Application Fee
General (UR) and OBC of H.P. Rs. 1,000/- (Rupees One Thousand only) - Non-refundable
EWS of H.P. (Economically Weaker Sections) Rs. 800/- (Rupees Eight Hundred only) - Non-refundable
SC / ST / IRDP / BPL / ANTODAYA of HP Rs. 800/- (Rupees Eight Hundred only) - Non-refundable
Female Candidates of All Categories of HP Rs. 800/- (Rupees Eight Hundred only) - Non-refundable

HPSCB Junior Clerk Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process

The selection process for HPSCB Junior Clerk Recruitment 2026 consists of 2 stages - Online Examination (150 marks, 150 minutes, conducted through IBPS Mumbai) followed by Document Verification/Scrutiny. There is no personal interview. Candidates up to 1.75 times of vacant posts will be called for document verification. Final selection will be made strictly on the basis of merit in the online examination after document verification. Candidates must score minimum 40% marks in the online examination to be shortlisted for document verification. Candidates declared successful who do not personally attend document verification will have their candidature cancelled.

Stage 1 - Online Examination (150 Marks, 150 Minutes)

Sl. No. Subject No. of Questions Marks Duration
1 Reasoning 30 30 150 Minutes (2½ Hours) - No separate time limit per section
2 Numerical Ability 30 30
3 English 30 30
4 General Awareness (including HP General Knowledge) 30 30
5 H.P. Cooperative Societies Act and H.P. Cooperative Societies Rules 30 30
Total 150 150  

Stage 2 - Document Verification / Scrutiny

Shortlisting Ratio Candidates up to 1.75 times of vacant posts will be called for document verification
Minimum Qualifying Marks 40% of total marks (i.e., minimum 60 out of 150) in online examination
No Negative Marking There is NO negative marking in the online examination
Question Paper Type Objective type multiple choice (MCQ) - bilingual (English and Hindi)

Tie-Breaking Rules

1st Tie-Break Preference to candidates possessing higher academic qualifications
2nd Tie-Break Preference to candidates belonging to the State of H.P.

HPSCB Junior Clerk Recruitment 2026 - Exam Syllabus

The Online Examination consists of 5 sections - Reasoning, Numerical Ability, English, General Awareness, and H.P. Cooperative Societies Act and Rules - each carrying 30 marks (total 150 marks, 150 minutes). The level of examination and syllabus is in accordance with the minimum educational qualification criteria i.e. Graduation level. The question paper is bilingual (English and Hindi) and is of objective type MCQ. There is no negative marking. Preference will be given to candidates possessing knowledge of customs, traditions, languages, and culture of Himachal Pradesh and the test shall include questions on such subjects.

Section Topic Key Coverage Marks
Section 1 Reasoning Logical Reasoning, Analytical Reasoning, Verbal and Non-Verbal Reasoning 30
Section 2 Numerical Ability Quantitative Aptitude, Number Systems, Arithmetic, Data Interpretation 30
Section 3 English Reading Comprehension, Grammar, Vocabulary, Sentence Completion 30
Section 4 General Awareness (including HP GK) General Awareness, Current Affairs, HP General Knowledge, Customs, Traditions, Languages and Culture of Himachal Pradesh 30
Section 5 H.P. Cooperative Societies Act & H.P. Cooperative Societies Rules Provisions of HP Cooperative Societies Act and HP Cooperative Societies Rules 30

How to Apply for HPSCB Junior Clerk Recruitment 2026

Applications must be submitted online only through the Bank's website www.hpscb.bank.in by clicking the "APPLY ONLINE" option. Hard copy applications or applications by any other mode will not be accepted. The online application window is open from 09-05-2026 to 29-05-2026. Candidates must register on the portal, make fee payment online, and upload all required documents. No change will be possible after clicking the "COMPLETE REGISTRATION" button. Candidates are advised to keep their valid personal email ID and mobile number active till the completion of the entire recruitment process.

Before applying, candidates must have ready: scanned photograph (4.5 cm × 3.5 cm), signature (with black ink on white paper), left thumb impression (on white paper with black or blue ink), and a hand-written declaration in English on white paper with black ink. Signature in CAPITAL LETTERS will NOT be accepted. The hand-written declaration text is: "I, _______ (Name of the candidate), hereby declare that all the information submitted by me in the application form is correct, true and valid. I will present the supporting documents as and when required."

Documents Required to be Produced at Document Verification (when called):

  • Graduation degree certificate and mark sheets from recognized University
  • Matriculation and 10+2 certificates from HP school/institution (if applicable)
  • Experience Certificate countersigned by Assistant Registrar, Cooperative Societies of H.P. - with copy of managing committee resolution for initial appointment and statutory audit report pages (3 years for PACS quota; 5 years for OCS quota)
  • Age proof (10th/12th class mark sheet/certificate)
  • Bonafide Himachali Certificate from competent authority (for reserved category candidates)
  • SC/ST/OBC/EWS/PwBD/WFF/IRDP certificate from competent authority (if applicable)
  • Non-Creamy Layer (NCL) Certificate (for OBC candidates) - in latest prescribed format
  • EWS Income and Asset Certificate issued by Deputy Commissioner/SDO (Civil)/Tehsildar (for EWS candidates) - family income below Rs. 4 Lakhs per annum
  • PwBD Certificate (minimum 40% disability) + Medical Certificate from competent authority confirming fitness for duty (for PwBD candidates)
  • Discharge Certificate (for Ex-Servicemen candidates)
  • WFF Certificate (for Ward of Freedom Fighter candidates)
  • IRDP/BPL/Antodaya Certificate countersigned by Block Development Officer (if applicable)
  • NOC and Good Character Certificate from current employer (for candidates in regular/confirmed service)
  • e-Receipt and printout of online application form

Apply Online at: https://ibpsreg.ibps.in/hpscbmar26/

HPSCB Junior Clerk Recruitment 2026 - Application Link and Form Details

The online application for HPSCB Junior Clerk Recruitment 2026 is to be filled and submitted through the Bank's official website. The step-by-step process is as follows:

Step Action Details
Step 1 Visit Bank's Website Go to www.hpscb.bank.in → Click "APPLY ONLINE" → Choose "Click here for New Registration" → Enter Name, Contact Details, and Email ID → Note the Provisional Registration Number and Password generated
Step 2 Fill the Application Form Fill all personal details, category, qualification, and experience details. Use "SAVE AND NEXT" to save data if unable to complete in one go. Details must match exactly as in certificates/mark sheets.
Step 3 Upload Documents Upload: (1) Photograph (4.5×3.5 cm, 20-50 KB, JPG); (2) Signature (black ink, 10-20 KB, JPG); (3) Left Thumb Impression (black/blue ink on white paper, 20-50 KB, JPG); (4) Hand-written Declaration (black ink on white paper, English only, 50-100 KB, JPG). Capture live webcam photo as required.
Step 4 Preview and Complete Registration Click "Preview Tab" to verify all details → Modify if required → Click "COMPLETE REGISTRATION" only after verifying everything is correct. No changes allowed after this step.
Step 5 Pay Application Fee Click "Payment" Tab → Pay online via Debit Card (RuPay/Visa/MasterCard/Maestro), Credit Card, Internet Banking, IMPS, or Mobile Wallets → Wait for server intimation (do not press Back/Refresh) → Download e-Receipt
Step 6 Submit and Print Click "Submit" → Take printout of e-Receipt and online application form with fee details → Download Call Letter (around 7 days before exam) from www.hpscb.bank.in using Registration Number/Roll Number and Password/Date of Birth

For queries: [email protected]

Apply Online at: https://ibpsreg.ibps.in/hpscbmar26/

Important Instructions for HPSCB Junior Clerk Recruitment 2026 Candidates

  • All reserved category benefits including age relaxation and fee concession apply only to Bonafide Himachali candidates.
  • Candidates must possess valid experience certificate from their cooperative society - false experience certificates will result in summary cancellation of candidature irrespective of qualifying the online examination.
  • Experience certificates must be issued by the concerned Inspector of Society and countersigned by the Assistant Registrar, Cooperative Societies of H.P. supported by managing committee resolution and statutory audit report pages.
  • No hard copy applications will be accepted - online submission only via www.hpscb.bank.in.
  • Application fee is non-refundable; fee once paid will not be refunded under any circumstances.
  • Signature in CAPITAL LETTERS and hand-written declaration not in candidate's own handwriting or not in English will be treated as invalid.
  • Candidates already in regular (confirmed) service must submit NOC and good character certificate from current employer at document verification - absence of NOC will result in cancellation of candidature.
  • There is NO negative marking in the online examination; minimum 40% marks required to qualify.
  • Candidates must appear in person at document verification - non-appearance will lead to cancellation of candidature without notice.
  • OBC candidates must submit a valid Non-Creamy Layer certificate; EWS candidates must have family gross annual income below Rs. 4 Lakhs per annum.
  • PwBD candidates must have minimum 40% degree of disability and must submit Medical Certificate from competent authority confirming fitness for duty at selected post.
  • Wards of Ex-Servicemen are NOT eligible for posts advertised for Ex-Servicemen.
  • Selected candidates will be on probation for a period of two years (extendable up to maximum 3 years).
  • No TA/DA is admissible for appearing in the online examination.
  • Selected candidates will be posted anywhere in the area of operation of H.P. State Cooperative Bank in Himachal Pradesh.
  • For any dispute related to selection process, the decision of the Registrar, Co-operative Societies of Himachal Pradesh shall be binding and final; jurisdiction shall be Shimla (HP) only.
  • Candidates are advised to visit www.hpscb.bank.in regularly for all updates regarding the recruitment process.

The Central Bank of India has officially announced the Watchman cum Gardener, Office Assistant, Counselor FLC Bhopal Raisen, Attender/Sub Staff Recruitment 2026 with various openings. The detailed notification was published at centralbank.bank.in. Candidates who meet the age criteria of 22 to 65 years and hold qualifications ranging from 7th Standard, 10th Standard to Graduate can now submit their offline applications from now to 04-06-2026. Direct links to download the notification and apply offline are shared below.

Central Bank of India Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria

  • Watchman cum Gardener: Passed 7th Standard; experience preferably in agriculture/gardening/horticulture.
  • Office Assistant: Graduate viz. BSW/BA/B.Com with computer knowledge; knowledge in Basic Accounting preferred; fluent in spoken and written local language; proficient in MS Office (Word and Excel), Tally & Internet; skill in typing in local language essential.
  • Counselor FLC Bhopal Raisen: Graduate in any discipline from recognized university; computer literate, proficient in basic knowledge of MS Office, internet, typing in local language.
  • Attender/Sub Staff: Matriculate/10th Standard passed; well conversant with the local language.

Office Assistant Rs. 20000/- and allowances
Counselor FLC Bhopal Raisen Rs. 25000/- p.m. or last pay & allowances drawn less pension (whichever is lower) plus Rs. 1000/- p.m. for Mobile, Conveyance

  • Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
  • Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
  • Check all details carefully before submission.
  • Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
  • Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 04-06-2026.
  • Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

Jammu and Kashmir Bank (J&K Bank) has officially released a notification for the recruitment of 7 Zonal Security Officer and Financial Literacy (FL) Counsellor Posts. This recruitment drive offers a great opportunity for candidates looking for banking jobs. Interested and eligible candidates can apply online through the official website.

The online application process starts from 21-05-2026 and will remain open until 04-06-2026, so applicants are advised to submit their forms well before the deadline to avoid last-minute issues. In this article, you will find complete details about Zonal Security Officer and Financial Literacy (FL) Counsellor Recruitment 2026, including vacancy details, eligibility criteria, age limit, salary, selection process, application steps, and important links.

J&K Bank Recruitment 2026 - Overview

Company Name Jammu and Kashmir Bank (J&K Bank)
Post Name Zonal Security Officer and Financial Literacy (FL) Counsellor
No of Posts 7
Advt No JKB/HR/Rectt/2026-253
Salary Zonal Security Officer: Rs. 45,000/- Per Month. FL Counsellor: Rs. 22,000/- Per Month.
Qualification Graduate in any discipline for Zonal Security Officer. Graduate with experience in Banking/related fields and knowledge of Banking, Law, Finance, Agriculture for FL Counsellor.
Age Limit Zonal Security Officer: Max 62 years. FL Counsellor: Max 65 years.
Last Date 04-06-2026
Apply Mode Online
Job Type Contract

Post Name Total Posts

J&K Bank Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria

  • Zonal Security Officer: Graduate in any discipline preferably from a recognized University/ Institute. Minimum of three years of experience as Deputy Superintendent of Police or equivalent.
  • FL Counsellor: Graduate with experience in Banking/ related fields and having sound knowledge of Banking, Law, Finance, Agriculture and allied activities. Should have requisite communication and team building skills and the knowledge of local language is essential. Working knowledge of Computers. Preference will be given to candidates with knowledge/skills of having conducted Financial Literacy Camps. Preference will be given to honourably retired J&K Bank Officer not below the rank of Senior Manager (i.e. Scale-III Cadre).

Zonal Security Officer Rs. 45,000/- Per Month TA/DA admissible for official tours/visits. No superannuation benefits viz. Pension, Provident Fund or Gratuity. No other perquisites/facilities. Taxes on the income would be deducted at source as per extant Government Guidelines.

J&K Bank Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process

  • Screening of applications based on qualification, experience and suitability.
  • Interview/Interaction to assess knowledge, experience and skill for Zonal Security Officer.
  • Personal interview to assess communication ability, interaction and teaching skills, knowledge/skills required for FLC Counsellor in conducting camps, experience in related fields. Demonstration / Presentation to assess teaching skills and communication capability for FL Counsellor.

How to Apply

Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the J&K Bank Various Posts Recruitment 2026.

📄 Complete Details & Notification

South East Central Railway (SECR) has published the Act Apprentice Notification 2026 on 18-05-2026. The recruitment drive aims to fill 1079 Act Apprentice positions. Candidates within the age range of 15 to 24 years and holding Matriculation (10th) with minimum 50% marks along with ITI Certificate (NCVT/SCVT) in relevant trade are eligible to apply online at the secr.indianrailways.gov.in. The application process will be active from 19-05-2026 to 18-06-2026, and candidates can easily access the notification PDF and apply link below.

FOLLOW US

SECR Nagpur Apprentice Recruitment 2026 Notification PDF

South East Central Railway, Divisional Office, Personnel Department, Kingsway, Nagpur has officially released Notification No. P/NGP/SAS/2024/16 dated 18/05/2026 for Engagement of Act Apprentices under the Apprentices Act 1961 and Apprenticeship Rule 1992 in Nagpur Division & Motibagh Workshop, Nagpur for the year 2026-27. The notification covers 977 slots for Nagpur Division and 102 slots for Motibagh Workshop across 23 and 8 designated trades respectively. The notification includes complete details on vacancies, eligibility conditions, age limits, educational qualifications, selection process, stipend, medical fitness, and application instructions. Candidates are strongly advised to read the full notification before applying online.

  • Download SECR Nagpur Apprentice Recruitment 2026 Official Notification PDF

SECR Nagpur Apprentice Recruitment 2026 Overview

Organization Name South East Central Railway (SECR), Divisional Office, Kingsway, Nagpur-440001
Notification No. P/NGP/SAS/2024/16 dated 18/05/2026
Post Name Act Apprentice (Trade Apprentice)
Under Act Apprentices Act 1961 & Apprenticeship Rule 1992
Unit Nagpur Division (Estt. Code: E05202702695) & Motibagh Workshop, Nagpur (Estt. Code: E05202702494)
Total Vacancies 1079 (977 – Nagpur Division + 102 – Motibagh Workshop)
Stipend As per prescribed rates (Central Apprenticeship Council norms)
Training Duration 1 (One) Year
Application Mode Online only (via https://www.apprenticeshipindia.gov.in)
Selection Mode Merit List based on Matriculation % + ITI Marks
Official Website https://www.apprenticeshipindia.gov.in

SECR Nagpur Apprentice Recruitment 2026 Important Dates

Event Date

Opening of Online Application Portal 19-05-2026
Last Date for Online Application Submission 18-06-2026 (till 23:59 hrs)
Age Calculated As On 19-05-2026
Document Verification / Medical Examination Date To be notified separately

SECR Nagpur Apprentice Recruitment 2026 - Vacancy Details

A total of 1079 Act Apprentice slots have been announced across 23 designated trades in Nagpur Division and 8 designated trades in Motibagh Workshop, Nagpur. Vacancies are distributed across UR, SC, ST, OBC, and EWS categories with separate provisions for PH (Physically Handicapped) and Ex-Servicemen. Vacancies may be increased or decreased at the discretion of the administration.

(i) Nagpur Division – Trade-wise Vacancy (Establishment Code: E05202702695) – Total: 977

Sl. No. Trade Total
1 Fitter 90
2 Carpenter 41
3 Welder 22
4 COPA 158
5 Electrician 267
6 Stenographer (English) / Secretarial Assistant 25
7 Plumber 33
8 Painter 44
9 Wireman 46
10 Electronics Mechanic 21
11 Mechanic Diesel 124

Total / कुल 977

(ii) Motibagh Workshop, Nagpur – Trade-wise Vacancy (Establishment Code: E05202702494) – Total: 102

1 Fitter 44
2 Welder 6
3 Carpenter 10
4 Painter 4
5 Turner 4
6 Stenographer (English) / Secretarial Practice 3
7 Electrician 18
8 COPA 13
Total / कुल 102

Note: Vacancies above may be increased/decreased at the discretion of administration, if necessary.

SECR Nagpur Apprentice Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria

Candidates must fulfill all eligibility conditions as on the date 19-05-2026. Before applying, candidates should ensure they fulfill the eligibility and other criteria. Engineering Graduates and Diploma Holders are not eligible to apply for apprenticeship in response to this notification as they are governed by a separate scheme of Apprenticeship. Candidates who have already done apprenticeship in any organization should not apply again - such candidatures will not be entertained.

Educational Qualification

Qualification Details
Matriculation (10th) Passed Matriculation or equivalent with minimum 50% marks from a recognized board.
ITI Certificate National Trade Certificate (NTC) in the notified trade issued by NCVT, or Provisional Certificate issued by NCVT/SCVT. Candidate must fill their 10th & ITI marks on the portal in qualification section; otherwise the application will be automatically rejected. No other higher qualification to be filled.

SECR Nagpur Apprentice Recruitment 2026 - Age Limit

Candidates must be minimum 15 years and not more than 24 years of age as on 19-05-2026. Age relaxation is applicable for SC/ST (5 years), OBC (3 years), Divyang/PWBD and Ex-Servicemen (10 years). For Ex-Servicemen, an additional 10 years relaxation (plus 3 years if continuous service of 6 months) is also applicable. Age relaxation for OBC and SC/ST candidates is subject to submission of the latest caste certificate in central format. The upper age limit shall not exceed the relaxed limit in any case.

Community-wise Date of Birth Range (Age as on 19.05.2026)

Sl. No. Community Date of Birth (Between)
1 UR (Unreserved) 19.05.2002 to 19.05.2011
2 OBC (Other Backward Class) 19.05.1999 to 19.05.2011
3 SC / ST 19.05.1997 to 19.05.2011
4 PWBD / Ex-Serviceman 19.05.1992 to 19.05.2011

SECR Nagpur Apprentice Recruitment 2026 - Application Fee

The notification does not mention any application fee for SECR Nagpur Apprentice Recruitment 2026. Candidates are advised to check the official NAPS portal at https://www.apprenticeshipindia.gov.in for any fee-related updates before applying.

Category Application Fee
All Categories No application fee mentioned (refer official portal for updates)

SECR Nagpur Apprentice Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process

Selection will be based on a merit list prepared for all candidates who apply against the notification. The merit list will be prepared on the basis of percentage of marks in Matriculation (minimum 50% aggregate) plus ITI marks in the trade in which Apprenticeship is to be done. For candidates from boards like Board of Secondary Education Andhra Pradesh and Board of Public Examination Kerala (grade-based systems), SECR Nagpur Division will take the midpoint of the range of grades obtained, treating each subject as out of 100 marks for average calculation. Shortlisted candidates will be subject to verification of all original testimonials and appropriate medical examination. After selection, requests to change division/unit will not be entertained.

Tie-Breaking Rules

1st Tie-Break Candidate with older age shall be preferred
2nd Tie-Break Candidate who passed Matriculation exam earlier shall be considered first (if date of birth is also the same)

How to Apply for SECR Nagpur Apprentice Recruitment 2026

Applications must be submitted online only through the National Apprenticeship Promotion Scheme (NAPS) portal at https://www.apprenticeshipindia.gov.in (Establishment Code: E05202702695 for Nagpur Division; E05202702494 for Motibagh Workshop). The online portal will be active from 19-05-2026 to 18-06-2026 (23:59 hrs).

Candidates must carefully fill their 10th and ITI marks on the portal in the qualification section - if these marks do not appear in the downloaded Excel file, the candidature will be rejected. Do not fill any other higher qualification. Candidates have to choose either Nagpur Division or Motibagh Workshop at the time of application.

A unique registration number will be issued to each applicant during online submission - candidates are advised to save/note it for future correspondence. If the EWS/Ex-Servicemen option is not available on the portal, apply under your actual category and submit the EWS/Ex-Servicemen certificate physically to this office.

Documents Required at the Time of Document Verification (on being called):

  • Matriculation / 10th Standard Mark Sheet and Certificate (original)
  • ITI National Trade Certificate (NTC) or Provisional Certificate from NCVT/SCVT
  • SC / ST / OBC / EWS / PWBD certificate in central format (if applicable)
  • Discharge Certificate (for Ex-Servicemen) or Armed Forces serving certificate (for children of Armed Forces personnel)
  • Disability Certificate issued by a competent authority (for PWBD candidates) as per Annexure III/IV/V/VI
  • Medical Certificate at the time of joining in prescribed proforma (signed by a Government Authorized Gazetted Doctor, not below the rank of Assistant Surgeon of Central/State Hospital)

No daily allowance, conveyance allowance, or travelling allowance will be paid to candidates called for document verification. No accommodation will be provided by Railway for apprentices.

Apply Online at: https://www.apprenticeshipindia.gov.in

Important Instructions for SECR Nagpur Apprentice Recruitment 2026 Candidates

  • Applications must be submitted online only through https://www.apprenticeshipindia.gov.in; no other mode of application will be accepted.
  • Candidates must fill 10th and ITI marks carefully on the NAPS portal; failure to do so will result in automatic rejection of the application.
  • Engineering Graduates and Diploma Holders are not eligible to apply under this notification.
  • Candidates who have previously done apprenticeship in any organization must not apply again; such candidatures will not be entertained.
  • Candidature will be cancelled if the candidate fails to produce required original testimonials for verification or any discrepancy is noticed.
  • If it is found that a candidate has submitted wrong/fake/false certificates, the Railway administration reserves the right to discharge the candidate at any stage without notice; they may also be liable for penal action.
  • After selection for engagement, requests to change division/unit will not be entertained.
  • No accommodation will be provided by Railway for apprentices; they must make their own arrangements.
  • No daily allowance, conveyance allowance, or travelling allowance will be paid to candidates called for document verification.
  • Age relaxation for OBC candidates is subject to submission of the latest OBC caste certificate in central format; age relaxation for SC/ST is subject to submission of caste certificate in central format.
  • The Railway administration does not undertake responsibility for sending replies to candidates not selected or not called; no correspondence will be entertained.
  • The decision of the administration regarding eligibility and selection at any level is final and binding.

How to Download RRB NTPC 10+2 UG Admit Card 2026?

Follow these simple steps to download your RRB NTPC 10+2 UG Admit Card 2026:

  1. Step 1: Visit your respective Regional RRB website or go to rrb.digialm.com
  2. Step 2: Click on the link for "NTPC Undergraduate Admit Card CEN 07/2025"
  3. Step 3: Enter your credentials:
    • Registration Number / Application Number
    • Date of Birth (DD/MM/YYYY)

  4. Step 4: Click on "Submit" button
  5. Step 5: Your RRB NTPC 10+2 UG Admit Card 2026 will appear on screen
  6. Step 6: Download and save the PDF file on your device
  7. Step 7: Take 2-3 printouts for exam day (keep backup copies)

Pro Tip: Check all details (especially exam date, shift, and center) on your admit card immediately after download. Report any discrepancies to the concerned RRB immediately.

  • Recent passport-size photographs (2 copies)

Not Allowed in Examination Hall:

  • Mobile phones, smartwatches, and any electronic devices
  • Bags, notes, books or study materials
  • Jewelry, watches (except simple analog), etc.

Important Instructions for RRB NTPC 10+2 UG Exam 2026

Before Exam Day:

  • Download admit card 2-3 days before your exam date
  • Verify exam center location on Google Maps
  • Plan your route and transportation
  • Carry only allowed items

On Exam Day:

  • Reach exam center 60-90 minutes before reporting time
  • Biometric verification (Aadhaar) is mandatory
  • Follow strict dress code and security guidelines
  • No entry after gate closure

What If RRB NTPC Admit Card Not Available?

If you're unable to download your RRB NTPC 10+2 UG Admit Card 2026, try these solutions:

  1. Clear browser cache and cookies, then try again
  2. Try different web browser (Chrome recommended)
  3. Use stable high-speed internet connection
  4. Visit your regional RRB website directly
  5. Contact concerned RRB helpdesk immediately

Important: Act immediately if facing issues. Don't wait until exam day.

Stay Updated: Visit your regional RRB website regularly for latest updates on RRB NTPC Result, Answer Key, and other notifications.

Quick Summary: Railway Recruitment Boards (RRBs) have released RRB NTPC Graduate 05/2024 Final Result 2026 on 7th May 2026 at respective regional official portals. Candidates can download the provisional shortlist/merit list PDF for Document Verification (DV) & Medical Examination using Roll Number. Check shortlisted candidates, cutoff, and next process below.

Great news for aspirants! The Railway Recruitment Boards have officially published the RRB NTPC Graduate 05/2024 Final Result 2026 (CEN 05/2024) today on 7th May 2026. Candidates who appeared in CBT-2 and CBAT can now check their provisional shortlist status for DV and Medical Examination across all 21 RRB regions.

This article provides complete information about RRB NTPC Graduate 05/2024 Final Result 2026 including direct download links, region-wise merit lists, selection process, and step-by-step instructions.

How to Check RRB NTPC Graduate 05/2024 Final Result 2026?

Konkan Railway Corporation Limited (KRCL) Recruitment 2026: Get the latest KRCL recruitment notification 2026 for 132 vacancies across 9 posts in the Mechanical/Project Department on a fixed term contract basis under Notification No. CO/P-R/7C/2026. The Walk-in Interview process starts on 8th June 2026 and the last walk-in interview date is 12th June 2026 at Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh. Find KRCL vacancies on the official website www.konkanrailway.com. You can also get OnlyJobs of “Upcoming KRCL Mechanical Department Recruitment 2026” notifications for freshers and experienced candidates. Also know the direct official link for KRCL Recruitment 2026 walk-in interview details from the KRCL career page.

FOLLOW US

Konkan Railway Corporation Limited (KRCL) Recruitment 2026 Notification PDF

Konkan Railway Corporation Limited (KRCL), a Public Sector Undertaking under the Ministry of Railways having its Corporate Office at CBD Belapur, Navi Mumbai, has officially released Notification No. CO/P-R/7C/2026 dated 14/05/2026 (Reference: CO/15/2026-PERS(72355)) for engagement of 132 candidates across 9 posts in the Mechanical/Project Department on a fixed term contract basis for an initial period of one year at VDPD Workshop, Visakhapatnam. The notification includes complete details on vacancies, eligibility, remuneration, scope of work, and walk-in interview schedule. Candidates are strongly advised to read the full notification and all Annexures before appearing for the walk-in interview. The notification is available on the official KRCL website.

  • Download KRCL Mechanical Department Recruitment 2026 Official Notification PDF

KRCL Mechanical Department Recruitment 2026 Overview

Organization Name Konkan Railway Corporation Limited (KRCL), A Government of India Undertaking under Ministry of Railways
Notification No. CO/P-R/7C/2026 dated 14/05/2026
Department Mechanical / Project Department
Total Vacancies 132 Posts (across 9 designations)
Nature of Engagement Fixed Term Contract – Initial period of 1 year, extendable up to 5 years based on satisfactory performance and requirement of KRCL
Place of Posting VDPD Workshop, Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh (Selected candidates can be posted and transferred anywhere to KRCL establishment during contract period)
Application Mode Walk-in Interview (with filled application form in prescribed format – Annexure-A)
Selection Mode Walk-in Interview (Group Discussion/Written Test may be introduced as elimination round depending on number of candidates)
Age Cut-off Date 01-05-2026
Official Website https://www.konkanrailway.com

KRCL Mechanical Department Recruitment 2026 Important Dates

Post Name Date of Walk-in Interview Registration Time
Junior Technical Assistant / Mechanical 08-06-2026 (Monday) 09:00 hrs to 12:00 hrs
Quality Inspector 09-06-2026 (Tuesday) 09:00 hrs to 12:00 hrs
Technician (Welder) 09-06-2026 (Tuesday) 09:00 hrs to 12:00 hrs
Technician (EOT Operator) 09-06-2026 (Tuesday) 09:00 hrs to 12:00 hrs
Technician (Fitter) 10-06-2026 (Wednesday) 09:00 hrs to 12:00 hrs
Vehicle Driver 11-06-2026 (Thursday) 09:00 hrs to 12:00 hrs
Lister/Forklift Operator 11-06-2026 (Thursday) 09:00 hrs to 12:00 hrs
Hydra Operator 11-06-2026 (Thursday) 09:00 hrs to 12:00 hrs
Office Boy/Helper/Khalasi 12-06-2026 (Friday) 09:00 hrs to 12:00 hrs

Venue for all Walk-in Interviews: Administrative Building, Wagon Repair Workshop, Autonagar, Vadlapudi, Gajuwaka, Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh.

KRCL Mechanical Department Recruitment 2026 - Vacancy Details

A total of 132 vacancies have been announced across 9 posts in the Mechanical/Project Department of KRCL. Reservation is as per Government of India policy. The number of posts is liable to change as per requirement of the Project.

Sl. No. Name of Post Total
1 Junior Technical Assistant / Mechanical 11
2 Quality Inspector 15
3 Technician (Welder) 16
4 Technician (Fitter) 22
5 Technician (EOT Operator) 16
6 Vehicle Driver 4
7 Lister/Forklift Operator 14
8 Hydra Operator 2
9 Office Boy / Helper / Khalasi 32
Total 132

KRCL Mechanical Department Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria

Candidates must fulfill all eligibility conditions as on the cut-off date 01-05-2026. Candidates must ensure they fulfill the criteria before attending the walk-in interview for a particular post. Incomplete or vague educational qualification will be invalid. Post-wise eligibility details are as follows:

Educational Qualification & Experience (Post-wise)

Post Name Educational Qualification Experience Required Upper Age Limit (as on 01-05-2026)
Junior Technical Assistant / Mechanical Full time Degree / Diploma in Mechanical Engineering / Production & Industrial Engineering / Automobile / Manufacturing / Mechatronic / Material Sciences / Metallurgical Engineering from AICTE recognized University/Institute. Minimum 01 year post-qualification experience. Preference for experience in Repair Workshops or Manufacturing Units. 50 years
Quality Inspector Full time Degree in Mechanical Engineering / Production & Industrial Engineering / Automobile / Manufacturing / Mechatronic / Material Sciences / Metallurgical Engineering from AICTE recognized University/Institute. Minimum 01 year in inspection/QA. Preference for Inspection/QA experience in Manufacturing Sector or repair activities on Railway Rolling stocks. 50 years
Technician (Welder) Minimum ITI qualification in Welding OR Welder Qualification Test Certificate as per ISO-9006-1. Minimum 01 year post-qualification experience in Mechanical Industry. Preference for experience in Manufacturing Sector or Railway Rolling stocks repair. 50 years
Technician (Fitter) ITI Certificate issued by a recognized ITI / Technical Training Institute / or any Government approved authority. Minimum 01 year post-qualification experience in Mechanical Industry. Preference for experience in Manufacturing Sector or Railway Rolling stocks repair. 50 years
Technician (EOT Operator) 10th Pass (compulsory) OR ITI Certificate issued by a recognized ITI / Technical Training Institute / or any Government approved authority. Minimum 02 years experience in EOT crane operation (for ITI holders). Minimum 04 years experience in EOT crane operation (for 10th Pass). Preference for Manufacturing Sector or Railway Rolling stocks repair experience. 50 years
Vehicle Driver 10th Pass (compulsory) and possession of valid Driving License for HMV issued by Regional Transport Office (RTO). Minimum 02 years post-qualification experience. Preference for experience in Manufacturing Sector or Railway Rolling stocks repair. 50 years
Lister/Forklift Operator ITI Certificate issued by a recognized ITI / Technical Training Institute / or any Government approved authority. Minimum 02 years post-qualification experience in Forklift and lister truck operation. Should obtain valid Forklift Driving License within 03 months of appointment. Preference for Manufacturing Sector or Railway Rolling stocks experience. 50 years
Hydra Operator ITI Certificate issued by a recognized ITI / Technical Training Institute / or any Government approved authority. Minimum 02 years post-qualification experience in Hydra operation. Should obtain valid Hydra Driving License within 03 months of appointment. Preference for Manufacturing Sector or Railway Rolling stocks experience. 50 years
Office Boy / Helper / Khalasi Minimum 10th Standard pass and physically fit for general office duty, housekeeping and maintenance duties. Minimum 02 years post-qualification experience. Preference for experience in Repair Workshops or Manufacturing Units. 50 years

KRCL Mechanical Department Recruitment 2026 - Age Limit

The upper age limit is 50 years for all posts as on 01-05-2026. Age relaxation is provided to reserved category candidates as per Government guidelines. Age relaxation for Ex-servicemen is discretionary.

Category Upper Age Limit (as on 01-05-2026)
Unreserved (UR) / EWS 50 years
OBC (Non-Creamy Layer) 3 years relaxation (max 53 years)
SC / ST 5 years relaxation (max 55 years)
Ex-Servicemen Discretionary as per Government guidelines

KRCL Mechanical Department Recruitment 2026 - Remuneration

The consolidated monthly remuneration is inclusive of Basic, DA, HRA, Conveyance, and Mobile Allowance. Remuneration is classified as per A Class, B Class, and C Class cities. Annual remuneration will increase by 4% of the consolidated remuneration after completion of every year, subject to requirement of KRCL and at the discretion of KRCL. No accommodation and no Food/Mess Allowance will be provided by KRCL.

Post Name Basic (Rs.) DA (Rs.) Consolidated Remuneration – A Class (Rs.) Consolidated Remuneration – B Class (Rs.) Consolidated Remuneration – C Class (Rs.)
Junior Technical Assistant / Mechanical 18,481 10,719 47,220 44,300 41,380
Quality Inspector 12,025 6,975 30,900 29,000 27,100
Technician (Welder) 12,025 6,975 30,900 29,000 27,100
Technician (Fitter) 12,025 6,975 30,900 29,000 27,100
Technician (EOT Operator) 12,025 6,975 30,900 29,000 27,100
Vehicle Driver 12,025 6,975 30,900 29,000 27,100
Lister/Forklift Operator 12,025 6,975 30,900 29,000 27,100
Hydra Operator 12,025 6,975 30,900 29,000 27,100
Office Boy / Helper / Khalasi 11,392 6,608 29,300 27,500 25,700

Other Allowances/Facilities: Insurance, Payment of Gratuity, and Bonus as per provisions of New Labour Code-2026 (as applicable). TA as per extant KRCL policy for official travel beyond the project area. Complementary Railway Pass for travel on duty as per extant KRCL policy. Rest House of KRCL if available while on duty; otherwise hotel charge reimbursement as per KRCL rates on production of vouchers. 15 days fully earned leave on completion of every 6 months (2.5 leaves per month); 8 days Casual Leave during the year. Weekly off and public holidays as applicable at place of posting.

KRCL Mechanical Department Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process

The selection process for KRCL Mechanical Department Recruitment 2026 is through Walk-in Interview. Candidates fulfilling the eligibility criteria may report directly for the walk-in interview at the specified venue with all original certificates and one copy of application in prescribed format (Annexure-A) along with one set of self-attested copies of all required certificates. Registration will be done between 09:00 hrs and 12:00 hrs only on the date of walk-in interview.

After preliminary screening of applications submitted in person, only provisionally eligible candidates will be interviewed. Group Discussion (GD) or any other elimination round like written test may be introduced depending on the number of candidates; only those who clear the elimination round will be called for further selection. The nominated Committee’s decision shall be final and binding. No train/bus fare/TA/DA shall be payable by KRCL for attending the walk-in interview. Candidates should come prepared to stay for a minimum of 2 days if required, at their own cost.

Stage Details
Preliminary Screening Verification of applications and documents submitted in person. Only provisionally eligible candidates allowed to proceed.
Elimination Round (if required) Group Discussion (GD) or Written Test may be introduced depending on number of candidates.
Interview By nominated Committee of KRCL. Merit list drawn based on performance in interview, qualification, and post-qualification experience.

How to Apply for KRCL Mechanical Department Recruitment 2026

Candidates fulfilling the eligibility criteria may report directly for the walk-in interview at the venue on the specified date and time for their respective post. Candidates must fill and bring one copy of the application in the prescribed format (Annexure-A attached with the notification), available on the KRCL website at www.konkanrailway.com under Recruitment > Current Notifications. No online or offline application submission by post/courier is required – candidates must appear in person.

Registration time is strictly 09:00 hrs to 12:00 hrs only on the date of walk-in interview. Applications not conforming to the prescribed format or having illegible/ambiguous certificates or without certificates or incomplete will be summarily rejected. Any kind of canvassing will result in disqualification of the candidate at any stage of selection without assigning any reason.

Documents (Self-attested copies) to be attached with the filled application form:

  • Copies of certificate in proof of qualification (as per the qualification specified in the Notification Annexure)
  • Copy of proof of Date of Birth (SSLC/SSC Certificate/Birth Certificate)
  • Copy of Caste certificate in support of claims, if any (OBC-NCL certificate in prescribed Central Government format; certificate not indicating validity will not be accepted)
  • Copy of service certificate in support of claims for Ex-servicemen, if any
  • Experience Certificate issued by previous employer
  • Two passport size recent photographs
  • Character certificate from Gazetted Officer/Executive Officer certifying good moral character

All original certificates must also be brought for verification at the time of the walk-in interview. Selected candidates will be required to pass a prescribed medical examination before the contract is entered into. Selected candidates must be able to join within a maximum of 30 days after issuance of offer of appointment. Selected candidates will be required to execute an agreement and indemnity bond of Rs. 50,000/- in favour of KRCL on stamp paper of Rs. 100/- or more.

Walk-in Interview Venue: Administrative Building, Wagon Repair Workshop, Autonagar, Vadlapudi, Gajuwaka, Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh.

Important Instructions for KRCL Mechanical Department Recruitment 2026 Candidates

  • Candidates must ensure they fulfill the eligibility criteria before attending the walk-in interview for a particular post.
  • Registration time is strictly 09:00 hrs to 12:00 hrs only on the date of the walk-in interview; late arrivals will not be registered.
  • Candidate can appear for interview at this one venue only; no TA/DA will be paid for attending the walk-in interview.
  • This engagement is on a fixed term contract basis and shall not result in regular/permanent absorption in KRCL service. Candidates must give an undertaking in writing to KRCL to this effect.
  • Selected candidate can be posted and transferred at any time, anywhere to the KRCL establishment during the contract period.
  • Contract may be terminated by giving one month’s notice from either side or payment in lieu thereof. Contract can be terminated without notice if performance is not satisfactory.
  • No accommodation will be provided and no Food/Mess Allowance will be paid by KRCL.
  • Even after contractual agreement, if any document/certificate/information is found incorrect or false, contractual service will be immediately terminated without prior notice, besides legal action.
  • Candidates who are already working in KRCL on contract basis and selected against this notification do not require to follow the condition of notice period for joining the new post; however, a relieving letter from the concerned Konkan Railway authority will be required at the time of joining.
  • The Corporation reserves the right to cancel/restrict/curtail/enlarge the contract engagement process without any prior notice and without assigning any reason.
  • Any kind of canvassing will result in disqualification of the candidate at any stage of selection without assigning any reason.
  • Statutory Income Tax, Professional Tax, and other applicable taxes will be deducted at source.
  • The information on KRCL’s website www.konkanrailway.com at its link Recruitment > Current Notifications should be checked for updates.

DSSSB How to Download Admit Card

  • It is very easy to download Delhi DSSSB Admit Card / Call Letter.
  • DSSSB issues the admit card in two main ways.
  • First Method: In this method, you will have to enter your date of birth along with class 10 roll number, passing year and your password, after that you can directly download the admit card from the dashboard.
  • Second Method : In this method, you will have to enter the application number of the online application you had applied, along with you will also have to enter your date of birth, after that you will be entered in a dashboard, then you will see a tab above, in that you will get the link of generate admit card, click on it. But your admit card will be downloaded on your mobile / computer.
  • If you do not have the application number then you have to follow the first method and find your application number.
  • You can print the admit card in color or black and white print on A4 size paper.
  • Read all the instructions given in the admit card carefully before going to the exam.

DSSSB How to View Question Paper and Download Answer Key and

  • You have to click on the link given below to view and download the answer key and question paper.
  • To login, you have to enter your date of birth along with the application number, after that you can see the answer given by you, you can also get information about the correct answer, if you have an objection in any answer, then you can do from the same.

OPSC Assistant Professor Answer Key 2026 - Download PDF, Response Sheet & Objection Link

The Odisha Public Service Commission (OPSC) has released the Assistant Professor Answer Key 2026. Candidates who appeared for the Assistant Professor examination held on 22 February 2026 can now check and download the provisional answer key from the official website opsc.gov.in.

FOLLOW US

This recruitment drive aims to fill 312 vacancies. If you find any discrepancy in the answers, you can raise objections before the discipline-specific deadline (e.g., up to 30 May 2026 for some subjects).

OPSC Assistant Professor Answer Key 2026 - Quick Overview

Organization Odisha Public Service Commission
Post Name Assistant Professor
Answer Key Status Released
Release Date 20th May 2026
Official Website opsc.gov.in

Direct Link: Download OPSC Assistant Professor Answer Key 2026 PDF

How to Download OPSC Assistant Professor Answer Key 2026?

Follow these simple steps to download your answer key:

  1. Visit the official website: opsc.gov.in
  2. Navigate to the "Answer Key" or "Recruitment" section
  3. Click on "OPSC Assistant Professor Answer Key 2026" link
  4. Log in using your Registration Number and Password/Date of Birth
  5. Your answer key with recorded responses will appear on screen
  6. Download and save the PDF for future reference

How to Raise Objection Against OPSC Assistant Professor Answer Key 2026?

If you disagree with any answer in the provisional key, follow these steps:

  1. Log in to your candidate portal on opsc.gov.in
  2. Go to the "Challenge/Objection" section
  3. Select the question(s) you want to challenge
  4. Upload supporting documents or references (if required)
  5. Pay the objection fee (if applicable)
  6. Submit before the deadline

Important: Objections submitted after the deadline will NOT be considered.

OPSC Assistant Professor Answer Key 2026 - Important Dates

Event Date

Last Date to Raise Objection Varies (check notice)
Final Answer Key (Expected) Soon after objections
Result Declaration (Expected) To be announced

How to Calculate Your Score Using OPSC Answer Key 2026?
